title: Moist Yeasty Jamaican Chocolate Bake
description: A comforting Jamaican dish featuring cardamom and tempering chocolate, wrapped in a ti-leaf for added flavor and texture. This yeasty bake is perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, yeast, and sugar.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the melted butter, eggs, and ground cardamom.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Wrap the dough in a ti leaf and place it in a baking dish.
Bake the dough for 30 minutes or until it is golden brown.
Melt the tempering chocolate in a double boiler and pour it over the baked dough.
Let the bake cool for 10 minutes before serving.
